Document:
# Precursor This guide will explain Precursor and its related mechanics.
## The Basics Precursor can be obtained by doing objectives found in the Job Network Implant. Once you have enough precursor you can join a Rogue Network and get more advanced objectives. Members of a Rogue Network can use Precursor to purchase unique items that are otherwise unobtainable.
## The ins and outs Precursor is only useful to members of the Rogue Networks. Participating in a Rogue Network can be dangerous as you may be hunted by members of other Rogue Networks or local authorities. If you are hunted down, you will be compromised and lose all Rogue Experience and a lot of stored Precursor.
